title: Removing the domain from an email address

content.problemStatement:
In a user account system, email addresses are used for login. To personalize the experience, the system extracts only the username (the part before `@`) from the email address for display.

---

**Tasks to do:**
1. Find the position of the `@` symbol in the email address.
2. Remove the domain portion starting from `@` to the end.
3. Display the resulting username.

---

**Expected Output:**
```default
Username: username
```
